description: DEFERRED v2 design track: let sovereign AZOA nodes interoperate without surrendering custody/data/autonomy. ActivityPub-shaped (signed documents, not consensus). Four additive layers: L0 signed node descriptor + G-gate conformance manifest (alpha-cheap, ~1-2d, land early); L1 verifiable cross-node holon references (azoa:// resolve+verify+cache, no DB replication); L2 discovery (static peers -> optional directory nodes -> never DHT); L3 identity portability (same self-sovereign avatar across nodes with per-node revocable consent). Value is NOT federated (chain settles between nodes). Activation-gated on build-side traction (>=3 operators + >=1 real cross-node use case).
